goals: Expose canonical version and build identity in the in-app About panel.
Synchronize release metadata across every public release surface.
Document the local-first runtime, privacy boundary, build gate and delivery procedure.
Fail the source verification when release metadata, UI identity or release documents drift.
runtimeGuarantees: The deployed browser uses same-origin MediaPipe modules and the verified local hand model.
Drawing state remains local unless the creator explicitly exports, shares or uses the optional AI feature.
Updates save the current project before service-worker promotion or navigation.
